_doc: Allowlist for the dependency license gate (scripts/license-check.mjs). Mirrors the backend valory-xyz/tomte `liccheck` [Licenses] posture: permissive + weak-copyleft authorized, strong copyleft (GPL/AGPL/LGPL-3.0) and MPL-1.1 unauthorized, PARANOID (unknown/unresolved => fail). SPDX matching is case-insensitive; a trailing `*` (license-checker guess marker) is stripped. See SUPPLY-CHAIN-SECURITY.md §9.

_fields.allowedSpdx: SPDX ids accepted as a leaf in a license expression. OR => any disjunct allowed; AND => all conjuncts allowed.
_fields.unauthorizedSpdx: SPDX ids explicitly denied. Takes precedence over allowedSpdx, so a copyleft id can never pass even if mistakenly also listed as allowed. Documents intent.
_fields.licenseOverrides: Replace a mis-detected/UNKNOWN package's license before evaluation. Each entry: {package, version?, license, reason, added (YYYY-MM-DD), review (YYYY-MM-DD)}. Match is name@version if version given, else exact name. None needed today.
_fields.exemptions: Skip a package entirely (genuinely-disallowed license accepted with justification). Each entry: {package (exact npm name), reason, added, review}. None needed today — the tree is 0 violations.
